name: Paulie Gee's Slice Shop
teaser: You have to order the Freddy Prinze, an upside down Sicilian with sesame seeds on the bottom. Also order everything else.
review: Paulie serves up Drew Brown's fantastic new school slices in a throwback retro setting. Note: You have to order the Freddy Prinze, an upside down Sicilian with sesame seeds on the bottom. Another note: Also order everything else.
headsUp: The Freddy Prinze (upside-down Sicilian with sesame) is non-negotiable.
update: The upside-down Sicilian is still one of the best slices in the city.
hours: Monday: 11:30 AM – 10:00 PM · Tuesday: 11:30 AM – 10:00 PM · Wednesday: 11:30 AM – 10:00 PM · Thursday: 11:30 AM – 10:00 PM · Friday: 11:30 AM – 1:00 AM · Saturday: 11:30 AM – 1:00 AM · Sunday: 11:30 AM – 10:00 PM
